summary: Pre-production validation complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - homepage loads, navigation works, theme color teal (#0891B2) applied correctly, references 'Näytä lisää' button toggles between 4/6 cards, all 6 service pages load with correct H1 and SEO titles, admin panel CRUD works, forms validate, responsive layouts correct at 1920px/768px/375px. Minor issue: Crowne Plaza Hotel reference has test data in 'type' field ('Crowne Plaza Hotel UPDATED' instead of work type).

design_issues.screen: References section - Crowne Plaza Hotel card
issues: Work type field shows 'Crowne Plaza Hotel UPDATED' instead of actual service type - this is test/seed data, not a code issue

Services API returns 6 services

Service Pages API returns 6 published pages

Theme color CSS variable set to #0891B2 (teal)

2-column grid on desktop (md:grid-cols-2)
1-column grid on mobile (grid-cols-1)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Clean up Crowne Plaza Hotel reference 'type' field to show actual work type instead of 'Crowne Plaza Hotel UPDATED'
critical_code_review_comments: Global theme color system working correctly with CSS variables
Button states properly defined with all states (normal, hover, active, focus)
References section correctly implements 'Näytä lisää' toggle
Service pages have proper SEO structure (one H1, page titles)
Minor console warning: 'fetchpriority' should be 'fetchPriority' - cosmetic React prop naming issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full pre-production validation complete. All backend APIs working, all frontend features functional. Theme color teal (#0891B2). 6 service pages, 6 references, 6 services. Admin CRUD functional. Responsive layouts tested at 1920px, 768px, 375px. Only cosmetic issue is test data in one reference's type field.
